interactions.stageContent: {"slideOutline":[{"slideNumber":1,"title":"About AtlusDeck","purpose":"Establish credibility with company background, customer logos, and market positioning"},{"slideNumber":2,"title":"Meridian's Growth Challenge","purpose":"Personalized framing of their 5-7 day proposal bottleneck and pipeline constraints"},{"slideNumber":3,"title":"AI-Powered Proposal Automation","purpose":"Technical overview of the content assembly engine with HITL quality gates"},{"slideNumber":4,"title":"Platform Capabilities","purpose":"Deep dive into template management, slide library, and deck structure intelligence"},{"slideNumber":5,"title":"Google Workspace Integration","purpose":"Show native Slides/Docs/Drive integration with automatic folder organization"},{"slideNumber":6,"title":"Proven Results","purpose":"Quantified ROI: 95% faster turnaround, 20% engagement lift, 4x capacity scaling"},{"slideNumber":7,"title":"Pilot Program & Timeline","purpose":"Concrete rollout plan aligned with Meridian's Q2 deadline and budget approval"},{"slideNumber":8,"title":"Let's Get Started","purpose":"Clear CTA with demo scheduling and pilot kickoff next steps"}]}
